What is the journey of package PKG-1234?:
MATCH (p:Package {packageId: 'PKG-1234'})-[:processed_at]->(h:Hub)
RETURN p.packageId AS package_id, h.hubId AS hub_id, h.name AS hub_name, h.city AS hub_city
Which packages are delayed?:
MATCH (p:Package)
FILTER p.status = 'delayed'
RETURN p.packageId AS package_id, p.originCity AS origin, p.destinationCity AS destination, p.status AS status
Which hubs are connected to Hub Chicago?:
MATCH (h1:Hub {hubId: 'HUB-CHI'})-[:connected_to]->(h2:Hub)
RETURN h1.name AS from_hub, h2.name AS to_hub, h2.city AS to_city
What is the status of Hub Chicago and wh:
MATCH (h:Hub {hubId: 'HUB-CHI'})
RETURN h.hubId AS hub_id, h.name AS hub_name, h.status AS status, h.delayReason AS delay_reason
Which drivers handled package PKG-1234?:
MATCH (p:Package {packageId: 'PKG-1234'})-[:driven_by]->(d:Driver)
RETURN p.packageId AS package_id, d.driverId AS driver_id, d.name AS driver_name, d.homeHub AS home_hub
Who sent package PKG-1234?:
MATCH (p:Package {packageId: 'PKG-1234'})-[:sent_by]->(c:Customer)
RETURN p.packageId AS package_id, c.customerId AS customer_id, c.name AS customer_name, c.city AS city
Which drivers are based at Hub Denver?:
MATCH (d:Driver)-[:based_at]->(h:Hub {hubId: 'HUB-DEN'})
RETURN d.driverId AS driver_id, d.name AS driver_name, d.status AS status
Which packages passed through a degraded:
MATCH (p:Package)-[:processed_at]->(h:Hub)
FILTER h.status = 'degraded'
RETURN p.packageId AS package_id, p.status AS package_status, h.hubId AS hub_id, h.name AS hub_name, h.delayReason AS delay_reason
Show the full network topology \u2014 wh:
MATCH (h1:Hub)-[:connected_to]->(h2:Hub)
RETURN h1.hubId AS from_hub, h1.city AS from_city, h2.hubId AS to_hub, h2.city AS to_city
What is the root cause of the delay for:
MATCH (p:Package {packageId: 'PKG-1234'})-[:processed_at]->(h:Hub)
FILTER h.status = 'degraded'
RETURN p.packageId AS package_id, h.hubId AS hub_id, h.name AS hub_name, h.status AS hub_status, h.delayReason AS delay_reason
